mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.id_site, d.devicename AS name, d.id_device_group, d.datatablename, d.view_tablename, d.id_device_type, d.hidden, d.reverse_poa, dg.group_name, IFNULL(dt.title_trans, "N/A") AS type_title_trans, IFNULL(dg.title_trans, "N/A") AS group_title_trans, dg.table_name, dt.name AS device_type_name, dt.order, s.table_data_virtual, JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT( 'id', dp.id, 'name', , 'slug', dp.slug, 'id_device_group', d.id_device_group, 'unit', dp.unit, 'is_checked', dp.is_checked, 'id_generic_parameter', gp.id, 'generic_parameter_name', gp.name, 'id_generic_parameter_type', gp.id_generic_parameter_type, 'value_chart_tool', dp.value_chart_tool, 'min_value', IFNULL(dpf.min_value, 0.001), 'max_value', IFNULL(dpf.max_value, 0.001), 'rounding_decimals', dp.rounding_decimals )) AS parameters, 0 AS checked FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_group dg ON d.id_device_group = dg.id LEFT JOIN device_parameters dp ON dp.id_device_group = dg.id LEFT JOIN device_parameter_filter dpf ON dp.id = dpf.id_device_parameter AND d.id = dpf.id_device LEFT JOIN generic_parameters gp ON gp.id = dp.id_generic_parameter LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON dt.id = d.id_device_type LEFT JOIN site s ON d.id_site = s.id LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id_site} AND d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_device_type != 5 AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND dp.status = 1 AND dp.is_delete = 0 AND dp.is_filter = 1 AND (CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), 'UTC', t.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL)
GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY dt.order ASC, d.devicename ASC
SELECT date_from, date_to FROM hidden_data WHERE id_device = #{id} AND status = 1 AND is_delete = 0

SELECT categories_time, time_group_by AS time_full,
ROUND( IF( ${filterEnabled} = true AND ((${param.min_value} != 0.001 AND ${param.slug} < ${param.min_value}) OR (${param.max_value} != 0.001 AND ${param.slug} > ${param.max_value})), NULL, ${param.slug} ), ${param.rounding_decimals} ) AS ${param.slug}
FROM ( SELECT dv.time,
AVG(dv.nvmActivePower)
SUM(dv.nvmActiveEnergy)
AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance) / 60
AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance) / 12
AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance) / 4
AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance) * 1
AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance) * 24 / 1000
(SELECT SUM(daily_insolation) FROM () di WHERE time_group_by_week = DATE_FORMAT( DATE_SUB(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), INTERVAL (MOD(DATEDIFF(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), #{start_date}), 7 )) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d' )) / IF( DATEDIFF(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), #{start_date}) + 1 > FLOOR((DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) + 1) / 7 ) * 7, MOD(DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}), 7) + 1, 7 )
(SELECT SUM(daily_insolation) FROM () di WHERE time_group_by_month = DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m/%Y' )) / IF( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) = DATE_FORMAT( #{end_date} , '%b. %Y' ), EXTRACT(DAY FROM LAST_DAY(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ))) - DATEDIFF(LAST_DAY(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value )), #{end_date}), EXTRACT(DAY FROM LAST_DAY(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ))) )
(SELECT SUM(daily_insolation) FROM () di WHERE time_group_by_year = DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y' )) / IF( DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) = DATE_FORMAT( #{end_date}, '%b. %Y' ), EXTRACT(DAY FROM LAST_DAY(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ))) - DATEDIFF(LAST_DAY(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value )), #{end_date}), EXTRACT(DAY FROM LAST_DAY(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ))) ) / CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y' ) = DATE_FORMAT( #{start_date}, '%Y' ) THEN 13 - Month(IFNULL(MIN(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value )), #{start_date})) WHEN DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y' ) = DATE_FORMAT( #{end_date}, '%Y' ) THEN Month(#{end_date}) ELSE 12 END
NULL
AVG(dv.expected_power_ac)
AVG(
)
${param.value_chart_tool}(dv.${param.slug})
AS ${param.slug}
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 60 )* 60, '%H:%i' ) AS categories_time, FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 60 )* 60, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS time_group_by
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 300 )* 300, '%H:%i' ) AS categories_time, FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 300 )* 300, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS time_group_by
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i' ) AS categories_time, FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS time_group_by
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%H:00' ) AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00' ) AS time_group_by
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time_group_by
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 60 )* 60, '%d. %b %H:%i' ) AS categories_time, FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 60 )* 60, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS time_group_by
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 300 )* 300, '%d. %b %H:%i' ) AS categories_time, FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 300 )* 300, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS time_group_by
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%d. %b %H:%i' ) AS categories_time, FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS time_group_by
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%d. %b %H:00' ) AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00' ) AS time_group_by
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%d. %b' ) AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time_group_by
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 60 )* 60, '%d. %b %H:%i' ) AS categories_time, FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 60 )* 60, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS time_group_by
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 300 )* 300, '%d. %b %H:%i' ) AS categories_time, FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 300 )* 300, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS time_group_by
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%d. %b %H:%i' ) AS categories_time, FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS time_group_by
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%d. %b %H:%i' ) AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00' ) AS time_group_by
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%d. %b' ) AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time_group_by
CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) <= 44 THEN DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m/%d' ) ELSE DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) END AS categories_time, FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 60 )* 60, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS time_group_by
CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) <= 44 THEN DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m/%d' ) ELSE DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) END AS categories_time, FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 300 )* 300, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS time_group_by
CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) <= 44 THEN DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m/%d' ) ELSE DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) END AS categories_time, FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS time_group_by
CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) <= 44 THEN DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m/%d' ) ELSE DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) END AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00' ) AS time_group_by
CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) <= 44 THEN DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m/%d' ) ELSE DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) END AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time_group_by
CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) <= 44 THEN DATE_FORMAT( DATE_SUB(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), INTERVAL (MOD(DATEDIFF(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), #{start_date}), 7 )) DAY), '%m/%d' ) ELSE DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) END AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( DATE_SUB(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), INTERVAL (MOD(DATEDIFF(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), #{start_date}), 7 )) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS time_group_by
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m/%Y' ) AS time_group_by
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y' ) AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y' ) AS time_group_by
FROM ${datatablename} dv LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE dv.id_device = #{id} AND CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date}
AND CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) NOT BETWEEN #{item.date_from} AND #{item.date_to}
GROUP BY time_group_by ) t ORDER BY time
mapper.sql: SELECT dv.time, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time_group_by_day, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), INTERVAL (MOD(DATEDIFF(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), #{start_date}), 7 )) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time_group_by_week, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m/%Y') AS time_group_by_month, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y') AS time_group_by_year, AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance) * 24 / 1000 AS daily_insolation FROM ${datatablename} dv LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE dv.id_device = #{id} AND CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date} GROUP BY time_group_by_day
mapper.select: SELECT id, id_employee, id_site, params, DATE_FORMAT(created_date, "%m/%d/%Y %H:%i:%s") AS created_date, name, is_favorite FROM employee_chart_filter WHERE id_employee = #{id_employee} AND SHA1(id_site) = #{hash_id_site} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_chart_filter ( `id_employee`, `id_site`, `params`, `created_date`, `name`, `is_favorite` ) SELECT #{id_employee} AS id_employee, id AS id_site, #{params} AS params, #{created_date} AS created_date, #{name} AS name, #{is_favorite} AS is_favorite FROM site WHERE SHA1(id) = #{hash_id_site};
mapper.select:
SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%H:00') AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') AS time_full,
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%H:00') AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') AS time_full,
AS actual FROM ${datatablename} WHERE time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(#{start_date}, #{timezone_value}, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(#{end_date}, #{timezone_value}, 'UTC') GROUP BY time_full
